india_trends.title: Stocks to buy or sell: Dharmesh Shah of ICICI Sec suggests buying JSW Steel, Power Grid shares on April 27
india_trends.summary: Domestic benchmark indices Nifty 50 and Sensex saw gains on April 27, recovering from a three-session drop. Nifty rose 0.73%, while Sensex increased 0.77%. However, concerns over crude prices and quarterly results from Reliance and Axis Bank limited the overall market performance.

india_trends.title: Axis Bank share price tumbles 5% after Q4 results: Should you still buy? Here's what brokerages say
india_trends.summary: Axis Bank shares fell 5% following a slight dip in Q4 profit due to higher provisions and trading losses. Net profit for March quarter was ₹7,071 crore, down from ₹7,118 crore last year. The bank increased provisions by 139% to ₹3,522 crore amid geopolitical tensions.
